raw_description:
Located in Riyadh, Four Seasons Hotel Riyadh is a modern hotel situated in the famous Kingdom Tower. It offers an outdoor pool, a spa and an elegantly decorated accommodation. Guests can enjoy free WiFi throughout the property and in the hotel rooms.

Boasting views of Riyadh, all accommodation at Four Seasons are fitted with modern furnishings. Each has a seating area with a flat-screen TV and an iPod docking station. The marble bathroom includes a large vanity and a shower.

Guests can enjoy an eclectic fine dining Middle Eastern experience at The Grill.

Guests have various activities to do on site such as tennis courts, 2 squash courts and a racquetball court. Relaxing massage treatments are available at the spa complimented by the sauna and steam room.

Four Seasons Hotel Riyadh is a 20-minute drive from Antique Souk and 30 minutes by car from King Khalid Airport. Luggage storage can be arranged by the 24-hour front desk.

Couples particularly like the location — they rated it9.4for a two-person trip.

description: Experience clinical levels of high-end luxury at Four Seasons Hotel Riyadh. Located conveniently in its prime location, this property features 11 key amenities including Outdoor swimming pool, Free WiFi, Private parking.
